profile.headline: AI-Driven Tech Lead | Senior Software Engineer
profile.description:
Technical leader with 15 years of experience in designing and launching high-scale systems.

Expert in microservices and micro-frontend architectures powered by Node.js, React, and Angular. Focused on delivering business value through rigorous architectural oversight, ensuring code integrity and security in AI-assisted environments. Extensive expertise in data management and deploying resilient cloud infrastructure with full CI/CD automation.

Specialized in AI-Driven Development (AIDD): managing the full product lifecycle via Antigravity / Cursor orchestration and custom agentic workflows based on Anthropic patterns.
profile.target: Looking for a challenging role as an AI-Driven Tech Lead or Solutions Architect where I can leverage my expertise to build next-gen AI-integrated products.

skills.items: AI-Driven Development (AIDD), AI Orchestration, Prompt Engineering, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), Antigravity / Cursor, Anthropic patterns, Gemini CLI, AI-agents workflow optimization, AI-assisted Code Review & Final Solution Validation.
System Design, Solutions Architecture (Microservices, Microfrontends), API Design, Technical Roadmap, Team Leadership (2–5 devs), Stakeholder Communication, Technical Grooming.

TypeScript, Angular + RxJS, Next.js & React (SSR/SSG), State Management (NgRx, Zustand, TanStack Query), Tailwind CSS, SASS/SCSS, Module Federation (Microfrontends), Web Vitals & Performance Optimization.
Node.js, NestJS, Express.js, PostgreSQL, TypeORM, Firebase.
Google Cloud Platform (GCP), Oracle Cloud, AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Nginx, GitHub Actions (CI/CD), SonarQube.
Unit/Integration/E2E Testing (Jest, Jasmine, Karma), Architectural Supervision, Automated Quality Gates.

experience.title: AI-Driven Tech Lead
experience.description:
Designed and engineered a scalable decentralized ecosystem — delivering 3 independent production applications — integrating a DAO platform, Blockchain protocols, Telegram Mini Apps, and a React Native mobile app.

Led a lean, high-performing team of 3 specialists. Accelerated full-stack development and drastically reduced Time-to-Market by integrating AI orchestration (Antigravity/Cursor, custom AI workflows) into the engineering pipeline.
achievements: **AI-First Engineering:** Delivered 90%+ of the entire system logic using custom agentic workflows, achieving unprecedented development density and code consistency.

**Blockchain & Backend:** Engineered the platform core in Go (Golang) for blockchain operations and a high-performance backend using NestJS + Prisma + PostgreSQL. Integrated Open API and Firebase for hybrid cloud logic.
**Multi-Platform Architecture:** Designed a reusable micro-frontend system that powers independent web applications, Telegram Mini Apps (TMA SDK), and mobile interfaces built with React Native.
**Identity & Security:** Implemented a complex identity layer (SSO, Role-based Access, JWT) featuring seamless integration between Telegram accounts and standard web authentication protocols.

**Multi-cloud CI/CD:** Orchestrated full delivery pipelines using GitHub Actions and Docker containerization. Deployed a resilient infrastructure across a hybrid cloud environment (Google Cloud Platform and Oracle Cloud) for maximum availability.
experience.stack: Go, Next.js (Turbopack), NestJS, React Native, Telegram SDK, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Redis, Firebase, Cloudflare, Docker, GitHub Actions, GCP, Oracle Cloud.

subProjects.title: SAP Coveo AI Search Platform
subProjects.description: Led a cross-functional team of 4 in developing an enterprise AI-powered search platform. Designed and implemented a BFF (Backend for Frontend) architecture to serve as a high-performance middleware between the UI and external AI services.
achievements: **Resilient AI Orchestration:** Engineered a feature-flag system with a custom fallback mechanism on the backend, enabling seamless switching and high availability between OpenSearch and Coveo AI services.
**BFF & Caching:** Developed a NestJS middleware layer, integrating Redis caching to optimize search query performance and reduce external API latency.
**GenAI Integration:** Integrated a generative AI response system into the search interface, ensuring robust delivery of dynamic, AI-generated content.
**Leadership & Management:** Performed over 50% of BA/PM duties, including stakeholder management, backlog prioritization, and comprehensive technical documentation.
subProjects.stack: Angular, NestJS, Redis, TypeScript, RxJS, CoveoUI, OpenSearch.

subProjects.title: US Bank Loyalty Program (MVP)
subProjects.description: Engineered an end-to-end loyalty platform MVP for integration with US banking systems via Open API, managing the full lifecycle from database design to CI/CD.
achievements: **Hybrid Next.js Architecture:** Implemented SSR for SEO-critical promotional pages and a React-based client-side dashboard for administrative management.
**Security & Auth:** Developed a secure identity layer using OAuth 2.0 (Google), OTP, and JWT with granular role-based access control.
**Database Management:** Built a flexible data schema using Prisma ORM and PostgreSQL to handle complex promotional logic and user rewards.
**DevOps:** Automated deployment workflows via Docker and GitHub Actions, ensuring a rapid and reliable delivery cycle.
subProjects.stack: Next.js, React, Node.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL, OAuth 2.0, Docker, GitHub Actions.

subProjects.title: Carrefour — E-commerce Platform
subProjects.description: Led the development of critical features for a high-traffic e-commerce store (500K+ monthly users) during a strategic platform transition. Combined high-level technical execution with project management responsibilities.
achievements: **Product Impact:** Engineered high-conversion features, including advanced product filtering and an optimized checkout flow, directly improving user experience and sales metrics.
**DevOps & Quality:** Established a CI/CD pipeline integrated with Jenkins and SonarQube, significantly reducing code quality issues and automating delivery.
**Stakeholder Management:** Acted as a technical bridge between business analysts and the dev team, managing backlog prioritization, technical grooming, and requirement analysis.
**Team Coordination:** Coordinated and held full responsibility for a sub-team of 2 developers, ensuring rigorous code standards and consistent delivery within an Agile/Scrum framework.
subProjects.stack: JavaScript (ES6+), jQuery, SASS, Jenkins, SonarQube, Git, Agile.

subProjects.title: Refinitiv — Financial Trading Platform
subProjects.description: Delivered two Angular-based web applications, including a major migration of a legacy C# desktop solution to the web. Coordinated technical tasks for a sub-team of 3 developers, focusing on architecture and data integration.
achievements: **API Transformation:** Engineered a custom transformation layer using Express.js to bridge legacy SOAP services with a modern REST API, enabling seamless data migration from desktop to web.
**Real-time Services:** Designed the frontend architecture to handle high-frequency, real-time data streams via WebSocket connections.
**Performance:** Achieved a 60% reduction in initial load time (from 5s to 2s) by implementing lazy loading and advanced code-splitting strategies.
**Testing & Quality:** Maintained high engineering standards with 80%+ code coverage using Jasmine and Karma, ensuring enterprise-grade stability.
subProjects.stack: Angular, TypeScript, Express.js, RxJS, WebSockets, SOAP, REST API, Jasmine, Karma.

subProjects.title: MoneySuperMarket — Financial Services Aggregator
subProjects.description: Acted as a Key Developer for a high-traffic platform (10M+ users/mo) and Supervisor for a dedicated UI sub-team of 4. Engineered the core system using AngularJS and successfully orchestrated a strategic migration to Angular 2+ to enhance scalability.
achievements: **Architecture:** Designed a micro-frontend system and its seamless integration into the Adobe CQ5 (AEM) enterprise platform, reducing deployment time by 40%.
**Performance:** Optimized initial load time from 6.5s to 3.8s (42% improvement) through advanced asset tuning and performance optimization.
**Quality Control:** Developed a library of 50+ reusable components using BEM and established code review standards for the UI team, decreasing production bugs by 60%.
**Team Supervision:** Facilitated technical grooming and sprint planning for the UI group, maintaining a 95% sprint delivery rate in an Agile/Scrum environment.
subProjects.stack: Angular 2+, AngularJS, TypeScript, RxJS, Redux, NgRx, BEM, SASS, Adobe CQ5, Jenkins.

experience.title: Middle Frontend Developer
experience.description: Developed high-performance responsive promotional sites for financial services. Implemented complex web forms with robust client-side validation, improving data accuracy. Engineered mobile-first layouts using SASS, ensuring full cross-browser compatibility and optimized performance.
experience.stack: JavaScript (jQuery), HTML5/CSS3, SASS, WordPress, Twig, Git.

experience.title: Junior Frontend Developer
experience.description: Developed responsive interfaces and interactive UI components using Adobe AEM (CQ5). Built a reusable component library, significantly reducing development time for common UI patterns across client projects.

certifications.title: EPAM Systems
certifications.details: Advanced Software Engineering: Software Development Processes (SDLC), Backend Development (Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB) / UI Architecture Series: Enterprise-level Engineering Excellence (Angular stack core).

education.details: Belarusian State University of Informatics and Radioelectronics (BSUIR) · 2006–2011 · Minsk, Belarus
